improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day."/>
<meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"/>
<meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business decisions. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and professional support. Start with 3 free searches."/>
<meta property="og:type" content="website"/>
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-gideon-preview.jpg"/>
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"/>
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"/>
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"/>
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for business owners and traders. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."/>
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description under 160 characters improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the link is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. Including the price anchor and free searches removes friction and sets expectations before the click.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately names the product and clarifies its purpose, building trust and recognition. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial. 'No credit card required' removes friction and increases trial conversions. Copy stays factual and within provided context.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's trade and business intelligence, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace. Choose annual billing and save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—the paywall moment. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value, it reduces uncertainty and helps visitors make an informed decision to continue.
